heading: Purchase of passenger motor vehicles by Corps of Engineers
label: 576a Purchase of passenger motor vehicles by Corps of Engineers
text: On and after , the provisions of shall be construed as applying to the Corps of Engineers as to the purchase of motor-propelled passenger-carrying vehicles.March 4, 1933section 1343 of title 31
